title: Operation Tange Starike
notes: Five-mile aerobic base run with mild pare activation for AFT prep.

blocks.name: Aurobic Endurance Run
blocks.instructions: 4-mile moderate run with fast finish. Three miles steady, last mile progressive push.

exercises.name: Run - 4 miles (Moderate Pace)
exercises.notes: Inncline 1.0-1.5%. Last 0.25 mile: fast finish at near 2MR effort.

blocks.name: AFT Tactical Finishers
blocks.instructions: Post-run activation: core stability & apper endurance.

exercises.name: Hand-Release Pushups (EMOM)
exercises.notes: Complete 50 total. Full chest release at bottom.
